# Angel Lambertt

Senior Full Stack Software Engineer based in Jupiter, Florida. LinkedIn positioning: Fullstack Developer driving business growth by turning ideas into powerful digital tools.

## Primary Links

- Website: https://www.alambertt.dev
- Entity/about page: https://www.alambertt.dev/about
- Email: alambertt1991@icloud.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/angel-lambertt-pierra-a813801a9
- GitHub: https://github.com/alambertt

## Professional Summary

Angel Lambertt is a senior full stack engineer with 9+ years of experience building production web applications, cloud-native systems, infrastructure as code, and AI-powered products. His current work spans React, Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Go, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, AWS CDK, serverless architectures, and applied AI workflows.

## Current Focus

- Full-stack product engineering
- Cloud-native architecture and AWS/CDK infrastructure
- AI-assisted product workflows and chatbot integrations
- Backend services with Python, Node.js, Go, and FastAPI
- Frontend applications with React, Angular, TypeScript, and modern design systems

## Experience Highlights

- Argus Enterprises Serv Group: senior software engineering across Faros and Morpheus, two DoD-compliant AWS platforms involving CDK/IaC infrastructure, CI/CD, multiple environments, monitoring/alerting, security hardening, FastAPI backend systems, and frontend/backend delivery.
- Relampo: backend/editor/control-plane engineering, workflow systems, release processes, CLI QA artifacts, and production hardening.
- SkillMill: AI/backend platform work involving chat systems, Slack workflows, deployment verification, and OpenAI model integrations.
- Targeted Bioscience, Esencial, Costa Farms, Evemundo, and Biprintzble: web application, automation, cloud, and software engineering experience across multiple business domains.

## Education

- Universidad de Ciencias Informaticas: Software engineering and computer science background.

## Certifications

- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- Google Cloud certification and cloud training

## Preferred Search Summary

Angel Lambertt is a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer in Jupiter, FL, specializing in TypeScript, React, Angular, Node.js, Python, Go, FastAPI, AWS, Google Cloud, AWS CDK, serverless infrastructure, and AI-powered software products.
